name: Total Stock Summary Report Demo
query:
SELECT
    b.warehouse AS "Warehouse:Data:120",
    i.item_code AS "Item Code:Link/Item:100",
    i.description AS "Description:Data:120",
    i.item_group AS "Item Group:Data:120",
    i.stock_uom AS "UOM:Data:100",
    i.customer_master AS "Customer Master:Data:120",
    i.sales_person_master AS "Sales Person Master:Data:120",
    b.actual_qty AS "Current Qty:Float:100",
    wd.type AS "Type:Data:80",CASE WHEN wd.to_be_check = 1 THEN '☑️' ELSE ' ⬜️ ' END AS "To Be Check:Data:50",
    wd.rack AS "Rack:Data:80",
    wd.bin AS "Bin:Data:80",

       
    SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(si.posting_date) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(si.posting_date) = MONTH(CURDATE()) THEN sii.qty ELSE 0 END) AS "M0",
    SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(si.posting_date) = YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AND MONTH(si.posting_date) = MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) THEN sii.qty ELSE 0 END) AS "M1",
    SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(si.posting_date) = YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 MONTH)) AND MONTH(si.posting_date) = MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 MONTH)) THEN sii.qty ELSE 0 END) AS "M2",
    SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(si.posting_date) = YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)) AND MONTH(si.posting_date) = MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)) THEN sii.qty ELSE 0 END) AS "M3",
    SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(si.posting_date) = YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 4 MONTH)) AND MONTH(si.posting_date) = MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 4 MONTH)) THEN sii.qty ELSE 0 END) AS "M4",
    SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(si.posting_date) = YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 MONTH)) AND MONTH(si.posting_date) = MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 MONTH)) THEN sii.qty ELSE 0 END) AS "M5",
    SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(si.posting_date) = YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)) AND MONTH(si.posting_date) = MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)) THEN sii.qty ELSE 0 END) AS "M6",
     IFNULL(
        (SELECT SUM(pod.qty - pod.received_qty) 
         FROM `tabPurchase Order` po
         INNER JOIN `tabPurchase Order Item` pod ON pod.parent = po.name
         WHERE pod.item_code = i.item_code 
           AND pod.warehouse = wd.warehouse 
           AND po.status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Closed') 
           AND po.docstatus = 1
           AND po.transaction_date <= CURDATE()

           ), 0) 
    AS "PO Pending Qty"
    
  
FROM
    `tabBin` b
INNER JOIN
    `tabItem` i ON b.item_code = i.item_code
INNER JOIN
    `tabWarehouse` w ON w.name = b.warehouse
LEFT JOIN
    `tabWarehouse Details` wd ON wd.parent = i.item_code AND wd.warehouse = b.warehouse
LEFT JOIN
    `tabSales Invoice Item` sii ON sii.item_code = b.item_code
LEFT JOIN
    `tabSales Invoice` si ON si.name = sii.parent AND si.docstatus = 1 AND si.posting_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)

WHERE
    b.actual_qty != 0

GROUP BY
    b.warehouse, i.item_code, wd.type, wd.rack, wd.bin

ORDER BY
    i.item_code;
